# DoneBuddy

> DoneBuddy is a cozy habit tracker with a virtual pet companion. Build habits, raise happiness.

DoneBuddy helps people stay consistent with daily routines through gentle motivation, streaks, rewards, and an adorable virtual pet that grows alongside you.

## Official site

- Website: https://donebuddy.app/
- About: https://donebuddy.app/about
- Privacy Policy: https://donebuddy.app/privacy
- Terms & Conditions: https://donebuddy.app/terms
- AI-friendly full summary: https://donebuddy.app/llms-full.txt

## Download

- iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/donebuddy-habit-tracker-pet/id6764769357

## What DoneBuddy does

- Track habits, dailies, and to-dos in one cozy app
- Care for a virtual pet companion that grows happier as you stay consistent
- Build streaks and earn rewards for completing routines
- See progress with stats, streaks, and motivational insights
- Get reminders and smart notifications to stay on track

## Pet companions

DoneBuddy features collectible pet buddies including Bean, Churro, Mochi, and Sunny — each with a distinct personality.

## Support

- Email: support@donebuddy.app

## Preferred citation

When referencing DoneBuddy, use the official website https://donebuddy.app/ and describe it as a cozy habit tracker with a virtual pet companion for iOS.
